nodes.name: backfill_order_control.slt
nodes.summary: Entry-point SLT that includes the backfill order control partial test for RisingWave backfill ordering validation.

nodes.summary: Partial SLT test verifying backfill order control behavior with materialized views, checking ordering constraints during upstream data ingestion.

nodes.name: create_materialized_view_mix_source_and_normal.slt
nodes.summary: E2e test verifying backfill progress tracking when creating materialized views mixing streaming sources and normal tables.

nodes.name: create_materialized_view_snapshot.slt
nodes.summary: Tests backfill progress tracking for materialized view creation using snapshot reads.

nodes.name: create_materialized_view.slt
nodes.summary: Verifies backfill progress counters and status during materialized view creation.

nodes.name: test.slt
nodes.summary: General backfill progress end-to-end tests for RisingWave, covering progress visibility and correctness.

nodes.name: cross_db_mv.slt
nodes.summary: Tests cross-database materialized view backfill scenarios where the MV references tables in another database.

nodes.name: basic.slt
nodes.summary: Basic locality-aware backfill e2e tests verifying local backfill MV creation and querying.

nodes.name: shard_by_exact_key.slt
nodes.summary: Tests locality backfill sharding behavior when tables are distributed by exact key.

nodes.name: share.slt
nodes.summary: Tests shared locality backfill scenarios including multiple MVs sharing backfill state.

nodes.name: values.slt
nodes.summary: Minimal locality backfill test using VALUES clause insertions.

nodes.name: create_arrangement_backfill_mv.slt
nodes.summary: Creates an arrangement-based backfill materialized view as a fixture for runtime backfill tests.

nodes.name: create_no_shuffle_mv.slt
nodes.summary: Creates a no-shuffle materialized view fixture for runtime backfill tests.

nodes.name: create_table.slt
nodes.summary: Creates the base table fixture used by runtime backfill test suites.

nodes.name: create_wide_table.slt
nodes.summary: Creates a wide table with many columns as a fixture for testing backfill runtime with wide schemas.

nodes.name: insert_snapshot.slt
nodes.summary: Inserts snapshot-phase data for backfill runtime test setup.

nodes.name: insert_upstream.slt
nodes.summary: Inserts upstream streaming data for backfill runtime test setup.

nodes.name: insert_wide_snapshot.slt
nodes.summary: Inserts wide-table snapshot data for backfill runtime tests.

nodes.name: validate_rows_arrangement.slt
nodes.summary: Validates row counts in an arrangement-backfill MV after backfill completes.

nodes.name: validate_rows_no_shuffle.slt
nodes.summary: Validates row counts in a no-shuffle MV after backfill completes.

nodes.name: create_sink.slt
nodes.summary: Creates a sink backed by a materialized view for backfill sink integration tests.

nodes.name: different_pk_and_dist_key.slt
nodes.summary: Tests backfill sink behavior when the primary key and distribution key are different columns.

nodes.name: test_sink_backfill_order_validation.slt
nodes.summary: Validates ordering constraints during backfill of sinks, ensuring data arrives in correct order.

nodes.name: validate_sink.slt
nodes.summary: Validates sink output correctness after backfill completion.

nodes.name: check_data_equal.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test checking data equality between source and snapshot-backfilled materialized views.
